pr.title: Notable Non-Record: Learning Adapters on Random Linear Maps — 1.3705 BPB

output.summary: Freezes random orthogonal projections for each transformer matrix and trains only rank-32 LoRA adapters to fit the 16MB artifact budget.
techniques: Frozen random orthogonal projection for every attention/MLP weight regenerated from seed
Rank-32 LoRA adapters trained atop the random projections
Zero-byte frozen weights with adapter-only state dict
